Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First occurrence represents the initial review of the customer identity and submitted documents Second occurrence represents a re evaluation or secondary check triggered by new information

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The first call is an outbound call aimed at investigating and clarifying an account discrepancy The second call is a follow up call to inform the customer that the necessary adjustments have been made and to confirm resolution

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Lets name them C001 Initial Document Verification Document Re verification Post Submission C002 Discrepancy Clarification Call Adjustment Confirmation Call C003 Initial Physical ID Verification Post Adjustment Document Re verification

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Backtracking - PE

Text: Actually it is safer to just rename the specific instances that recur but renaming all instances of Verify Documents to Initial Document Verification when it is the first one makes the whole log consistent

Name: Validation - PE
